name: Spicy Orange Beef Stir Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine OXO bouillon, water, marmalade, hot pepper sauce, ground ginger, garlic powder, and cornstarch.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium heat.
3. Stir fry sliced green onions until they begin to turn golden.
4. Add diced green peppers and continue stir frying until they soften.
5. Add sliced carrots and cook until tender but still crisp.
6. Add the cooked diced beef and stir fry for an additional minute.
7. Pour in the OXO bouillon mixture and stir to combine.
8. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens (about 2-3 minutes).
9. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
10. Serve hot over steamed rice, garnished with orange segments, if desired.
Makes 4 servings.
